title: Pressurized pepsin digestion in proteomics: an automatable alternative to trypsin for integrated top-down bottom-up proteomics.
author: Lopez-Ferrer D Petritis K Robinson EW Hixson KK Tian Z Lee JH Lee SW Tolic N Weitz KK Belov ME Smith RD Pasa-Tolic L
content: S-EPMC3033671 PMC3033671 Pressurized pepsin digestion in proteomics: an automatable alternative to trypsin for integrated top-down bottom-up proteomics. Integrated top-down bottom-up proteomics combined with on-line digestion has great potential to improve the characterization of protein isoforms
